evaluation.summary: The coupled albedo-cloud experiment failed to produce reliable power-law fits (α and k are NaN) and only shows a modest temperature difference of 4.06 K at fixed ice loss, indicating no robust breakthrough.
next_directions: Debug the fitting routine to resolve NaN parameter estimates for both isolated and coupled cases.
Collect a broader range of ice extent and temperature data to enable statistically significant regression and hypothesis testing.
Perform sensitivity analyses to assess the impact of boundary conditions, time step, and cloud parameterizations on the results.
